case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $33,869.08 U.S.

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $33,869.08 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE YELLOW GOLD BAR, TOTAL WEIGHTOF APPROXIMATELY 2 OUNCES, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $3868.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE SILVER BAR, TOTAL WEIGHT OF APPROXIMATELY 5 OUNCES, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $135.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE SILVER BAR, TOTAL WEIGHT OF APPROXIMATELY ONE KILOGRAM, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $868.05 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
RESPONSE FILED BY DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION OF NECHAY, VALERY: UNTIL THE ASSET FORFEITURE ISSUE HAS BEEN FULLY RESOLVED (TRANSACTION ID # 100158399) FOR DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF SERVICE VIA CERTIFIED MAIL ON INTERESTED PARTY JEREMY BOIVIN (20-047) (TRANSACTION ID # 66211720) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION SHALL BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY VALERY NECHAY ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JEREMY BOIVIN: $26,121.05 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE YELLOW GOLD BAR, TOTAL WEIGHT OF APPROXIMATELY 2 OUNCES, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $3,868.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE SILVER BAR, TOTAL WEIGHT OF APPROXIMATELY 5 OUNCES, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $135.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ONE SILVER BAR, TOTAL WEIGHT OF APPROXIMATELY ONE KILOGRAM, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY ON KILOGRAM, VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $868.05 U.S. CURRENCY. THE FOLLOWING RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11469, ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489: $7,748.03 U.S. CURRENCY. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
